title: Introduction
html:
Pacific Settlement Bank (PSB) represents a new era in institutional finance. Established to provide the bridge between traditional capital markets and the digital asset ecosystem, PSB operates as a premier hybrid financial institution under the Sovereign Financial Framework Act.

Our mission is to ensure price stability and sound financial systems in support of sustainable economic growth across Oceania and the Pacific Financial Governance District (PFGD).

title: Regulatory Oversight
html:
PSB operates under a multi-layered regulatory architecture. Our primary mandate is derived from the Sovereign Financial Framework Act (2011), establishing PSB as the foundational clearing house of the Pacific Financial Governance District (PFGD).

  • FATF & OECD Alignment (Rule 15b compliance).
  • Real-time oversight via the Pacific Ledger.
  • Quantum-resistant data sovereignty.
